issues.description: HasRestingDon condition checks for resting DON!! cards, but effect text says '3 or more DON!! cards on your field' (not specifically resting). Should use HasAttachedDon or similar.
SearchDeck action missing the count parameter (should look at 7 cards from top of deck)
SearchDeck filter is 'Any' but should filter for [Galley-La Company] trait, and reveal up to 1
SearchDeck action missing maxCards:1 parameter (can only add up to 1 card to hand)
PlayFromHand action missing maxCards:1 parameter (can only play up to 1 card)
PlayFromHand filter should use 'trait' field instead of 'subType' for [Galley-La Company]
